"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); exports.finalize = void 0; var lift_1 = require("../util/lift"); function finalize(callback) { return lift_1.operate(function (source, subscriber) { try { source.subscribe(subscriber); } finally { subscriber.add(callback); } }); } exports.finalize = finalize; //# sourceMappingURL=finalize.js.map
